note: Paper MCP was at weekly limit — use this file when quota resets or paste HTML manually in Paper.
paperWorkflow: For each frame: create_artboard with name, width, height from spec.
write_html mode insert-children, targetNodeId = new artboard id, html = frame.html
If localhost images fail, adjust paths to your machine (see paperMediaPaths in src/system/tokens/brand.js).

frames.name: App / — Hero
frames.html:
Route · /
Prototype#intro — Hero
Internal prototype

Sonocea System Prototype

One system. Multiple states.

Sonocea needs to work across very different states, from vulnerable and supported moments to everyday regulation and performance recovery. This prototype demonstrates how one system can adapt behaviour without fragmenting the brand.

—personas define context
—scenarios define behaviour
—colour adapts · sound leads · motion supports

frames.name: App / — Framework
frames.html:
Route · /
Prototype#framework

System framework

Personas define context. States define behaviour.

Refined personas

Supported User

Guided or recurring use; stability and trust matter.

Sensitive System

Low sensory budget; immediacy and quiet matter.

Regulator

Rhythm and familiarity; steady structure.

Performance Seeker

Recovery and clarity; speed to focus matters.

Adoption context
Self-serve·
Supported / clinician-led·
Institutional / organisational·

Flow

Personas + scenarios → resolved tokens → live preview (see next frame).

frames.name: App / — Interactive demo
frames.html:
Route · /
Prototype#behaviour-controls · #live-preview

Interactive behaviour controls

Tune mode, persona, scenario, and system sliders. The preview updates in real time.

Controls (abstract)

Mode · Persona · Scenario · Sliders for contrast, density, intensity…

Live UI preview

One structural system — not a different app per mode.

frames.name: App / — Stories
frames.html:
Route · /
Prototype#stories

User stories / scenario switcher

Each scenario maps a persona to a behavioural mode. Selecting a card updates controls and live preview.

Sensory overload

Reduce noise; become immediately non-demanding.

End of day reset

Daily rhythm — steady, familiar, calming.

Rationale

State

User cognitive load elevated.

System response

Care mode, softer motion, fewer decisions.

frames.name: App / — Summary
frames.html:
Route · /
Prototype#summary

Product behaviour summary

Rules that keep the product aligned with the system: sound as the primary layer, visuals and motion in support.

Immediate entry
Low decision load
Sound-led experience
Motion supports, never competes
One system, adaptive behaviour

Adaptation may be guided through onboarding and refined through use over time.

frames.name: DS /design-system — Intro
frames.html:
Route · /design-system
Design system#ds-intro — Intro
Reference

Sonocea Design System

One system, adaptable across states

Visual and behavioural rules for app, prototype, brand, and future work — one coherent system that adapts through behaviour, not separate themes.

Core principlesColourTypographySpacingSurfacesMotionIconsImageryModesComponentsAssetsUsage

frames.name: DS — Usage notes
frames.html:
Route · /design-system
Design system#ds-usage — Usage notes

Usage notes

—

One system — adjust behaviour and density before inventing a new “theme.”

—

Sound remains primary; visuals reduce cognitive load.

—

Extend in src/system/ before adding one-off patterns.
